summary: Update mode testing complete for AdminDashboard refactoring. All extracted modal components (EditEmployeeModal and EmployeeShiftsModal) work correctly. The refactoring from 4176 to 3145 lines successfully extracted modals without breaking any functionality.

details.consignment-features.spec.ts: 12/16 tests passed (4 failures are pre-existing issues unrelated to refactoring)

admin_dashboard_loads.description: Admin dashboard loads correctly after refactoring

edit_employee_modal.description: Edit Employee modal opens, displays employee selection dropdown, form fields are editable, close button works

employee_shifts_modal.description: Employee Shifts modal opens from Hours by Employee section, shows employee name and summary stats, has filter options, close button works

updates_tab.description: Updates tab in Form Submissions still works correctly

consignment_form.description: Consignment form choice page, sign new agreement, and update flow all work. Shared components (PaymentMethodSelector, PhotoUploader, TermsAndConditions) exist with proper data-testids

notes_on_pre_existing_issues.description: 4 tests in consignment-features.spec.ts fail because they look for elements inside collapsible sections without expanding them first. These are pre-existing test spec issues unrelated to the AdminDashboard refactoring.
affected_tests: should have signature and date fields
should have custom profit split field in update form
should have additional info field in update form
should have collapsible payment update section

context_for_next_testing_agent: AdminDashboard refactoring verified. EditEmployeeModal and EmployeeShiftsModal extracted successfully. All core admin functionality works. Pre-existing test issues in consignment-features.spec.ts need the tests to expand collapsible sections before looking for elements inside them.
